name: Beef Burgundy
recipeIngredient: 3 lb Stew beef, cut into 2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a sturdy plastic bag, combine beef and flour. Shake to coat well.
2. In an electric skillet with heat control set at 325°F, brown the beef cubes, about 4 to 5 minutes.
3. Add onions and mushrooms. Saute onions until brown and mushrooms are dark.
4. Add wine and broth. Bring to a boil, stirring well.
5. Add bay leaf, salt, and pepper.
6. Cover and turn heat control down until the light goes out (simmer point).
7. Simmer 1½ to 2 hours, stirring occasionally, until meat is tender and sauce is thick.
8. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
